reasoning: The provided decorator attempts to inject a session argument if the wrapped function does not already receive one. It uses function code metadata (co_varnames) to detect if a parameter named "session" exists and whether it was supplied positionally. This approach is brittle (fails with keyword-only params, varying Python versions, etc.). A robust solution uses inspect.signature to check for the presence of a "session" parameter and whether it was provided, and falls back to injecting a new session when needed.
